mission: Collapse the 5 strand-ZFC encoding axioms (axiom_strand_zfc_witness_{amino,rna,dna,small_ligand,antibody}) into 5 derived noncomputable defs by introducing Encodable instances for the monomer alphabets (AminoAcid / RNANucleotide / DNANucleotide) and composing Encodable.encode (or String.length for SMILES) with the standard von Neumann ZFSet.mk ∘ PSet.ofNat injection.

conversions.raw_91_c3_disclosure: String.length-based injection, NOT SMILES-content-injective. Original axiom was uninterpreted symbol with no injectivity claim, so concrete def discharges axiom-keyword footprint. Faithful Char-by-Char injection deferred to W13+ (requires Encodable Char absent from mathlib4).

conversions.from_state: axiom : List AminoAcid → List AminoAcid → ZFSet.{0}

new_definitions.name: AminoAcid.encodable
new_definitions.method: manual 22-letter case table (encode + decode + encodek by cases)

user_constraint_no_new_mathlib: honored — Encodable, List.encodable, PSet.ofNat, ZFSet.mk are all standard mathlib4 (no axiom additions; no fabricated novelty per raw 91 C3)

verification.lake_build: PASS (8 jobs, no errors, no warnings)

raw_91_c3: Encodable is mathlib4-standard, not fabricated novelty (Mathlib.Logic.Encodable.Basic)

Round-trip preservation holds at the ℕ layer for amino-acid/RNA/DNA/antibody branches; smallLigand uses String.length (intentionally non-injective on String content; original axiom was uninterpreted symbol)
ZFSet.mk ∘ PSet.ofNat is the standard von Neumann ordinal injection; injective on ℕ
axiom_strand_zfc_witness signature Strand → ZFSet.{0} byte-identical pre- and post-W12; all downstream callers (StrandClass_ZFC, MKBridge.lean) compile unchanged
